content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
[[File:WarwickDavis-CVI.jpg|thumb|200px|[[Warwick Davis]] was born in February 1970]]

A list of events in '''1970''' related to ''Star Wars''.

==January==
*[[January 3|03]] – [[Dario Cioni]] is born.
*[[January 16|16]] – [[Garth Ennis]] is born.
*[[January 17|17]] – [[Genndy Tartakovsky]] is born.
*[[January 21|21]] – [[Ken Leung]] is born.
*[[January 23|23]] – [[David Rabbitte]] is born.
*[[January 31|31]] – [[Eric Walker]] is born.

==February==
*[[February 3|03]] – [[Warwick Davis]] is born.
*[[February 12|12]] – [[Dave Crossman]] is born.
*12 – [[Judd Winick]] is born.
*[[February 14|14]] – [[Simon Pegg]] is born.
*14 – [[Cary Porter]] is born.
*[[February 26|26]] – [[National Public Radio]] is founded.

==March==
*[[March 14|14]] – [[Meredith Salenger]] is born.
*[[March 20|20]] – [[Andrew Kishino]] is born.

==April==
*[[April 21|21]] – [[Jeff Anderson]] is born.
*[[April 23|23]] – [[Andrew Kreisberg]] is born.
*[[April 24|24]] – [[Kiff VandenHeuvel]] is born.

==May==
*[[May 11|11]] – [[Nicky Katt]] is born.

==June==
*[[June 12|12]] – [[Claudia Gray]] is born.
*[[June 15|15]] – [[Tim Beckmann]] is born.
*[[June 28|28]] – [[Rio Hackford]] is born.
*[[June 30|30]] – [[Brian Bloom]] is born.

==July==
*[[July 15|15]] – [[Kelly Sue DeConnick]] is born.

==August==
*[[August 2|02]] – [[Kevin Smith]] is born.
*[[August 17|17]] – [[Rupert Degas]] is born.

==September==
*[[September 3|03]] – [[Chris Bartlett]] is born.
*[[September 6|06]] – [[Kyle Rowling]] is born.
*[[September 22|22]] – [[William O'Connor]] is born.
*[[September 24|24]] – [[Marc Guggenheim]] is born.
*[[September 25|25]] – [[David Benioff]] is born.
*[[September 28|28]] – [[Jo Wyatt]] is born.
*[[September 30|30]] – [[Alistair Petrie]] is born.
*30 – [[Mark Bazeley]] is born.

==October==
*[[October 23|23]] – [[Grant Imahara]] is born
*[[October 28|28]] – [[Owen K.C. Stephens]] is born.
*[[October 30|30]] – [[Tory Belleci]] is born.
*[[October 31|31]] – [[Nolan North]] is born.

==November==
*[[November 15|15]] – [[Danny Sapani]] is born.

==December==
*[[December 6|06]] – [[Lewis MacLeod]] is born.
*[[December 9|09]] – [[Kevin Hearne]] is born.

==Unknown==
*[[Ram Bergman]] is born.
*[[William O'Connor]] is born.

==Sources==
*''[[Star Wars Year by Year: A Visual Chronicle]]''
*[[Star Wars Year by Year: A Visual Chronicle (updated edition)|''Star Wars Year by Year: A Visual Chronicle'' (updated edition)]]
*''[[Star Wars Year By Year: A Visual History, Updated and Expanded Edition]]''
*''[[Star Wars Year By Year: A Visual History, New Edition]]''
